Hero.description: Transforming business visions into interactive experiences through strategic design and high-end technology.

Methodology.subtitle: My work philosophy is based on friction reduction. Less visual noise, more execution speed.
Methodology.step1_desc: Not just code, but optimized systems. Total focus on Core Web Vitals and efficient rendering with Next.js.
Methodology.step2_desc: Interfaces that breathe. I use Figma and Tailwind to create consistent and visually impactful design systems.
Methodology.step3_desc: Clean and typed code with TypeScript. Prepared to grow without generating accumulated technical debt.
Methodology.footer_text: // Focused on delivering results, not just files.

Workflow.step1_desc: Deep analysis of the problem, definition of objectives and mapping of technical requirements.
Workflow.step2_desc: Creation of intuitive interfaces and high-fidelity prototyping focused on conversion.
Workflow.step3_desc: Transformation of the design into clean, performant and scalable code using React/Next.js.
Workflow.step4_desc: Final optimization, rigorous testing and launch on Edge infrastructure.

Services.main_card_desc: Creation of complete web applications, from design to API. I use the React ecosystem to deliver fast, secure and scale-ready interfaces.
Services.step1_desc: Code refactoring and caching strategies for applications that load instantly.
Services.step2_desc: Robust architectures using Node.js and integration with relational databases.
Services.step3_desc: Prototypaging and implementation of modern designs focused on usability and aesthetics.
Services.step4_desc: Best security practices and search engine optimization from day one.
Services.step5_desc: Creating responsive, accessible, and user-centric interfaces using the most modern technologies in the market.

TechStack.subtitle: Building resilient applications with the most advanced technologies in the JavaScript ecosystem and interface design.

Contact.placeholder_briefing: Describe your challenge, goals, and references...

nexus-ai.description: An enterprise-grade IA orchestration platform that revolutionizes how companies deploy and manage machine learning models at scale.
nexus-ai.challenge: Enterprise clients struggled with fragmented ML workflows, spending 70% of their time on infrastructure instead of innovation. Model deployment took weeks, and monitoring was scattered across multiple tools.
nexus-ai.solution: We architected a unified command center that abstracts away infrastructure complexity. A visual pipeline builder lets teams drag-and-drop models into production, while real-time observability surfaces performance insights instantly.
results: Reduced deployment time from 3 weeks to 2 hours
99.9% uptime achieved across all client deployments
Featured in TechCrunch as 'Platform of the Year'

pulse.description: A biometric-driven health companion that transforms raw sensor data into actionable wellness insights.
pulse.challenge: Health apps overwhelm users with raw data without context. Users see heart rates and step counts but don't understand what it means for their personal wellness journey.
pulse.solution: We built an AI layer that contextualizes every metric. The app learns your baseline, detects anomalies, and delivers personalized nudges. A 'Wellness Score' gamifies progress without creating anxiety.
results: 78% of users report improved sleep within 30 days
Acquired by major health tech company

vertex.description: A luxury fashion marketplace that blends editorial content with seamless commerce, redefining digital retail.
vertex.challenge: High-end fashion brands struggled to translate their in-store luxury experience to digital. Generic e-commerce templates felt cheap and eroded brand equity.
vertex.solution: We created an immersive shopping experience with editorial storytelling. 3D product visualization lets customers examine items from every angle. AI styling recommendations feel like a personal shopper.
results: 45% higher conversion rate vs industry average
Reduced returns by 32% through better visualization
Won FWA Site of the Day

quantum.description: A real-time financial analytics dashboard that processes millions of transactions to surface actionable trading signals.
quantum.challenge: Quantitative traders were drowning in data streams. Existing tools either lagged behind market movements or required PhD-level expertise to operate.
quantum.solution: We built a WebSocket-powered dashboard that visualizes complex market patterns in real-time. Custom-built charting components handle 10K+ data points without lag. AI alerts surface anomalies before they hit mainstream news.
results: Scaled to handle $500M daily transaction volume

aurora.description: A collaborative design system platform that keeps distributed teams in sync across Figma, code, and documentation.
aurora.challenge: Design systems break down at scale. Designers update Figma, but developers never see it. Documentation goes stale. Tokens drift between platforms.
aurora.solution: We created a single source of truth that bridges the designer-developer gap. Figma changes automatically sync to code. A visual diff tool surfaces inconsistencies before they ship.

Metadata.title: Guibus | Creative Engineer & Tech Specialist
Metadata.description: Portfolio of a Creative Technologist specializing in building high-performance digital products and scalable systems.
